cards.statement: Every skipped meal — did you notice?
cards.sub: Cats usually decrease food intake subtly when their body starts to feel unwell.
cards.alt: A fluffy cat resting near a soft lamp glow

cards.statement: They sit quietly — and you call it normal.
cards.sub: Chronic stress in cats is often mistaken for just temperament.
cards.alt: A tabby cat sitting in dramatic shadow and light

cards.statement: But something is watching silently — and caring.
cards.sub: CLEO detects small behavioral shifts that you might miss.
cards.alt: Cat silhouetted against a bright window
